title: Thai Cabbage Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with cabbage and a sweet and sticky sauce.

ingredients.name: thai sweet and sticky sauce
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the cabbage to the skillet and cook until it begins to soften.
Add the Thai sweet and sticky sauce to the skillet and stir to coat the cabbage.
Add the Chinese five-spice powder to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the diced khanom to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the cabbage is tender.
